name: jira-task-blocked-by-security
title: PROJ-512: Expose customer export API in reporting-service
body:
Part of epic PROJ-400 (Customer Data Portability). Implement a new export endpoint in reporting-service that streams customer data as CSV.

Blocked by PROJ-489 (security review of PII handling) — cannot start implementation until the security team signs off on the data classification. Depends on the data-platform team exposing the `customer_events` view.
